summary: Comprehensive testing of ML Career Path Predictor completed. Backend APIs working excellently (97% success rate). Frontend core functionality working well with minor UI integration issues.

issues: React warning about setState during render in LoginPage

Confusion matrix, ROC curve, learning curve endpoints
